chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 751 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.16/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.17/2026 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.18/2026 (R/Surety) 13.01.2026 Mr. Hajjan Shah, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Muneer Ahmed alias Muneer and Wazeer Ahmed alias Wazeer were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 25.08.2025, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- each, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing original solvency certificate No.07 dated 22.08.2025 issued by the Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Daharki. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 10.11.2025. Subsequently, treating the interim report as final report under Section 173, Cr.P.C., the same has been approved under ‘C’ class by learned Additional Sessions Judge-II, Mirpur Mathelo, vide his order dated 27.11.2025, annexed with this application. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, learned Assistant Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules.
Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
